title: Eligius
description: A datapack to enhance the base End dimension adding entirely new biomes but also small world details, mob variants, additions and features.
body:
The project will be costantly updated and it's totally open to suggestions and opinions about extra implementations. So my invitation is to leave a comment and follow my [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/user/EmergencyCap4343/ "reddit") to take a look at the new future adds. I work on this project by my self, so if you're interested in supporting me check out my marketplace [Fiverr](https://it.fiverr.com/matty_04).

# Contents
**Biomes**
- Over 16 completely new biomes
- Old biomes reworked
- Asteroid biomes
- Cave biomes

**Caves**
- A cave system
- vanilla mob variants
- New way to mine ores
- New emproved monster rooms

**Others Adds**
- Item with special powers
- New structures
- New achievements to discover and explore the new End 



# Game Features
- the respown ancor work in the end 
- new type of damege tp_damage
- powders can't be placed in the End like water in Nether
- Chorus teleportation sistem
